title: Fadcaer 3 Pcs Dog Latex Toy,Squeaky Dog Toys for Small Dogs,Puppy Interactive Rubber Squeak Toys Soft Bouncy Fetch Play Toy Dog Chew Toy for Reduce Boredom & Teeth Cleaning(Barbell)
features: 【Package Includes】You will receive 3 different style styles of dog latex toys, bright colours and unique appearance design can increase your pet's interest in playing. You can play throwing fetch game with your dog, let them have fun and exercise at the same time.

【Funny Squeaker】Squeaky dog toys with built-in sound device, press the toy will make a beautiful sound, which can attract your dog's attention, make them feel excited and happy, it is a good helper to entertain your pet. This toy makes playtime more fun for dogs and puppies can play all day long.

【Material】Our interactive dog toys are made of high quality latex material, which is very safe for pets and suitable for dogs to chew and play; the latex material is durable and stands up to puppy's chewing; the smooth surface is easy to clean, just rinse with water after use.

【Clean Teeth】This dog bouncy scratch toy can effectively clean your dog's teeth, promote oral health and maintain a reasonable diet. The soft texture is gentle and non-irritating to your pet's teeth, and also massages the gums to relieve discomfort during teething, giving your pet a healthy oral environment.

【Wide Applications】 This dog toy is lightweight and portable, suitable for Chihuahua, Bichon Frise, Yorkie, Shih Tzu, and other small dogs and puppies, ideal as a gift for your furry friend's birthday, New Year's Day, or any other important holiday gift, I believe your beloved pet will be very excited to receive this gift.
